about.title: About Me
about.description: Senior Web Engineer with 5+ years experience building high-performance frontend architectures, AI-integrated workflows, and scalable e-commerce solutions using React, Node.js, and GraphQL.

responsibilities: Launched AI-assisted 'Do-It-For-Me' restaurant profiles, handling user testing, analytics tracking, and rollout to significantly reduce manual setup time.
Built the 'Restaurant Groups' homepage to help multi-location businesses easily view key metrics, onboard new locations, and manage their accounts.
Smoothed out the merchant onboarding experience by fixing complex routing, form validation, and error-handling issues, helping users adopt the product faster.
Increased system reliability and made feature launches safer by writing robust end-to-end (E2E) and integration tests for both core and AI features.
Developed interactive reporting dashboards and data filters, giving restaurants and internal teams better visibility into business performance.
Led the migration of a critical configuration management app to React, building a reusable component system without causing any system downtime.
Upgraded core payment capture and global onboarding flows, adding thorough E2E test coverage to ensure secure and reliable financial processing.
Managed Node.js and React upgrades across the platform and built internal self-serve tools for payment integrations, heavily reducing manual work for operations teams.
Led frontend development for Uniqlo’s global e-commerce app using React.JS and GraphQL, ensuring high performance for over 60M active users.
Optimized a complex BFF application via Node.js and Express, streamlining communication with 20+ microservices for enhanced system scalability.
Architected a robust country configuration system, enabling seamless global scaling and localization across multiple international regions and sub-brands.
Implemented Google Wallet with 3DS support across 26 countries, driving a 10% boost in conversion rates by streamlining payment checkout flows.
Utilized Firebase Remote Config for A/B testing on cart recommendations, significantly improving CTA engagement and successfully productionalizing winning variants.
Built a high-performance PWA Email Newsletter Builder from scratch using React and PostgreSQL, empowering marketing teams with drag-and-drop template creation.
Developed a viral referral feature for Uniqlo US/Japan, contributing to a substantial customer base growth of 0.8 million users.
Engineered a React/GraphQL Proof of Concept to document API calls and error cases between SPA and microservices for improved clarity.
Mentored junior engineers on modern frontend practices and Uniqlo's platform architecture to ensure consistent knowledge sharing and onboarding.

openSource.title: Twenty
openSource.subtitle: (YCombinator - S23)
contributions: Engineered core CRM features for Twenty using NX, Recoil, and GraphQL to provide a modern open-source alternative to Salesforce.
Collaborated with core maintainers to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks within the Docker-orchestrated environment.

projects.name: Wizard's Chess (PWA)
projects.description: A high-performance multiplayer 3D chess environment with real-time social features.
details: Implemented immersive 3D rendering and game state management using React Three Fiber and Three.js.
Integrated peer-to-peer video communication using WebRTC and Firebase for real-time multiplayer engagement.
